problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
mechanism: CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway
hypothesis: Combining CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 35 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
